name: Language Suppression Sensor
description: Identifies when histories, documents, or curricula suppress non-English narratives, eliminate bilingual sources, or sanitize original oral/language-based accounts.
triggers: Source materials presented only in English without original terms
Erasure of bilingual cultures in historical records
pattern_detected: Lack of quotes or references in original language
Disappearance of multilingual activism or literature
consequence_risk: Loss of cultural nuance and worldview
Erasure of oral traditions and indigenous knowledge
example_phrases: "This document was originally written in..." (but no original shown)
"The activist said..." (with no multilingual context or idiom preserved)
anti-manipulation_function: Detect when translation is used to erase meaning

pad.source: inferred from keyword analysis of sensor content
pad.reference: Rosetta Shape Core generate.py — PAD compression layer
